name: Glazed Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, melt the margarine over medium heat.
2. Add orange juice, honey, orange rind, salt, pepper, and ginger to the pan.
3. Stir together until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Add the cooked carrots to the mixture and stir gently for 20 minutes, or until the carrots are coated with the glaze.
5. Remove from heat and transfer the glazed carrots to a serving bowl.
6. Sprinkle finely chopped sweet pickle over the top of the glazed carrots.
7. Serve immediately.
